message:
feat: rich tool renderers — full shell cmds, diff for edits, task list render

shell: show full command in detail panel (no truncation); first line
as header. Multi-line and long commands get a detail body.

edit_file: header shows filename; expanded view shows a syntax-
highlighted unified diff (chroma terminal256/monokai) of old→new.

task_list append: detail lists each task description + first line of
prompt. task_list update: detail shows icon + id + status for each
update (✓ done, → in_progress, ○ undone, ✕ cancelled).

spawn_agent: same treatment as shell (first line header, full task
in detail).

Add Detail field to toolCallInfo; renderToolCall shows Detail before
Output when expanded. Remove summarizeArgs shim.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
